TypeScript McpServer registers a single domain availability tool via domainAvailabilityTool.registerTools(serverInstance); source handler and Zod schema are present.

metadata.name: check-domain-availability
metadata.description:
PURPOSE: Checks the availability of one or more domain names.
        INPUT: An array of domain names.
        OUTPUT: A JSON object containing two arrays: 'available' (domains that appear to be unregistered) and 'unavailable' (domains that appear to be registered). Note: Availability checks depend on WHOIS server responses and might not be 100% accurate for all TLDs or due to temporary network issues. Domains where lookup failed are omitted.
        WHEN TO USE: Use this tool when you need to determine if specific domain names can potentially be registered.
        EXAMPLE: { "domains": ["google.com", "example-domain-that-is-likely-free-12345.com"] }

domains.description: An array of domain names to check for availability

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: An array of domain names to check for availability

notes: Low-level TypeScript MCP Server lists one tool in ListToolsRequestSchema and dispatches it in CallToolRequestSchema.

imagePath.description: Optional: Path to image file to include (supports png/jpg/gif)

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The message to send to OpenAI

parameters.name: imagePath
parameters.description: Optional: Path to image file to include (supports png/jpg/gif)

notes: FastMCP server in stepfun_mcp/server.py registers four @mcp.tool handlers and runs via mcp.run().

metadata.name: stepfun_chat_completion
metadata.description:
调用 StepFun 文本大模型生成聊天回复。
Args:
  messages (list): 聊天历史，格式为 [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'xxx'}]
  model (str, optional): 模型名称，默认 step-1。
Returns:
  TextContent: 回复内容

metadata.name: stepfun_vision_completion
metadata.description:
调用 StepFun 多模态大模型（支持图片+文本）。
Args:
  messages (list): 聊天历史，格式为 [{'role': 'user', 'content': ...}]
  model (str, optional): 模型名称，默认 step-1v。
Returns:
  TextContent: 回复内容

metadata.name: stepfun_text2img
metadata.description:
调用 StepFun 文生图模型生成图片。
Args:
  prompt (str): 文本描述
  model (str, optional): 模型名称，默认 step-1x-medium。
  n (int, optional): 生成图片数量，默认1。
  size (str, optional): 图片尺寸。
  seed (int, optional): 随机种子。
Returns:
  TextContent: 图片存储的文件路径

metadata.name: stepfun_text2speech
metadata.description:
调用 StepFun 语音合成（TTS）接口。
Args:
  text (str): 要合成的文本
  voice (str, optional): 声音类型，默认 cixingnansheng。
  model (str, optional): 模型名称，默认 step-tts-mini。
Returns:
  TextContent: 返回音频文件路径或URL
